description: Classify medical literature sentences as ADE (Adverse Drug Event) or NOT_ADE. Cortex v2.0 adds three missing learning mechanisms to v1.0: MCQLibrary (contrastive lessons replacing raw error buffer), RejectedProposalMemory (persistent genesis failure log), and MetaAgent (LLM as diagnostic physician). New structural mechanisms: shadow column warm-up period and trigger-scoped genesis probe.

route_definitions.name: causation
route_definitions.focus: Direct causal language drug to harm

route_definitions.name: context
route_definitions.focus: Therapeutic intent vs documented adverse outcome

seed_nodes.description: Primary cortical column — general ADE classifier, fires when no specialist matches (specificity=0)
seed_nodes.prompt:
You are a clinical NLP classifier. Your task: determine whether the following sentence describes an Adverse Drug Event (ADE) — a harmful outcome caused by a drug — or NOT_ADE.

Classify the sentence as ADE or NOT_ADE.

Respond ONLY with JSON:
{"classification": "ADE" or "NOT_ADE", "confidence": 0.0-1.0, "rationale": "<one sentence>"}

seed_nodes.description: Negation specialist — handles sentences containing explicit negation language (specificity=1)
Causation specialist — handles sentences with causal language (induced, associated) linking drug to outcome (specificity=1)
Short-sentence specialist — telegraphic clinical notations without negation (specificity=2)

v1_failure_modes_addressed: FM-Net-Learning-0: WorkingMemory showed errors only ('you got this wrong'). MCQLibrary now shows right+wrong+why. Contrastive signal is the missing learning mechanism.
FM-Repeated-Genesis: LLM proposed has_toxicity+negations 3 times with no memory. RejectedProposalMemory now fed to LLM before every genesis call.
FM-Cold-Column: Genesis probe ran on cold columns (0 traces, 0 rehearsal). Shadow period (1 round observation) + trigger-scoped probe now apply.
FM-Global-Probe-Dilution: 50-case global probe judged columns on cases they'd never route. Trigger-scoped probe now evaluates only trigger-matching cases.
FM-No-Adult: No diagnostic mechanism when F1 declined. MetaAgent now triggers on 2+ consecutive F1 declines.
v2_new_mechanisms: MCQLibrary: BCM-gated contrastive MCQ generation per column (LTD→2 MCQs, LTP→8 MCQs)
RejectedProposalMemory: persistent log of all failed genesis attempts, read by LLM at genesis time
MetaAgent: LLM as diagnostic physician — receives full cortex state + F1 trajectory + error patterns
Shadow column period: 1-round observation before routing activation
Trigger-scoped genesis probe: evaluate only cases matching the proposed column's trigger
retained_from_v1: Critical period plasticity (rising genesis threshold T(t))
FM-7 genesis rollback on probe damage
